children.heading: Commencement
children.label: 1 Commencement
children.text: To the extent practicable, the Secretary shall commence entering into contracts not later than 45 days after .April 4, 1996

children.heading: Deadline
children.label: 2 Deadline
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (3), the Secretary may not enter into a contract after .August 1, 1996

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: At the beginning of each fiscal year, the Secretary shall allow an eligible owner or producer on a farm covered by a conservation reserve contract entered into under that terminates after the date specified in paragraph (2) to enter into or expand a production flexibility contract to cover the contract acreage of the farm that was subject to the former conservation reserve contract.section 3831 of title 16

children.heading: Amount
children.label: B Amount
children.text: Contract payments made for contract acreage under this paragraph shall be made at the rate and amount applicable to the annual contract payment level for the applicable crop. For the fiscal year in which the conservation reserve contract is terminated, the owner or producer subject to the production flexibility contract may elect to receive either contract payments or a prorated payment under the conservation reserve contract, but not both.

children.label: A
children.text: the 1996 crop of a contract commodity; or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of acreage that was subject to a conservation reserve contract described in subsection (a)(3), the date the production flexibility contract was entered into or expanded to cover the acreage.

children.heading: Ending date
children.label: 2 Ending date
children.text: The term of a contract shall extend through the 2002 crop, unless earlier terminated by the owner or producer.

children.heading: Estimation of contract payments
children.label: c Estimation of contract payments
children.text: At the time the Secretary enters into a contract, the Secretary shall provide an estimate of the minimum contract payments anticipated to be made during at least the first fiscal year for which contract payments will be made.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: An annual contract payment shall be made not later than September 30 of each of fiscal years 1996 through 2002.

children.heading: Fiscal year 1996
children.label: A Fiscal year 1996
children.text: At the option of the owner or producer, 50 percent of the contract payment for fiscal year 1996 shall be made not later than 30 days after the date on which the contract is entered into and approved by the Secretary and the owner or producer.

children.heading: Subsequent fiscal years
children.label: B Subsequent fiscal years
children.text: At the option of the owner or producer for fiscal year 1997 and each subsequent fiscal year, 50 percent of the annual contract payment shall be made on December 15 or January 15 of the fiscal year. The owner or producer may change the date selected under this subparagraph for a subsequent fiscal year by providing advance notice to the Secretary.

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: 3 Special rule
children.text: Notwithstanding the requirements for making an annual contract payment specified in paragraphs (1) and (2), at the option of the owner or producer, the Secretary shall pay the full amount (or such portion as the owner or producer may specify) of the contract payment required to be paid for any of fiscal years 1999 through 2002 at such time or times during that fiscal year as the owner or producer may specify.
